default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss HeyGen's SEO strategy and GrowthX's content production, addressing concerns and exploring ways to improve results.](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HeyGen hasn't seen expected results from current content strategy, seeking drastic changes to justify continued investment](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [GrowthX to regroup and propose new prioritized strategy for remaining engagement period](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Potential to leverage HeyGen's video generation capabilities in content creation for better SEO results](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Need for clearer communication on scope (e.g., link building was descoped) and faster intervention when results lag](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

## Topics

### Current Strategy Performance

  - [Non-brand traffic 2X goal not met](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Blog post and tools publishing haven't gained expected traction](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Technical SEO driven by Daniel showing more growth](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Only successful content was on controversial "deepfake" keyword](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Link building was descoped, but wasn't clearly communicated](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### GrowthX Team and Capabilities

  - [Matthew Panzarino joined as Chief Content Officer (ex-TechCrunch EIC)](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Dave (ex-TripAdvisor SEO lead) dedicated to HeyGen account](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Team includes experts from ClickUp, G2, ActiveCampaign, and Softr](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Confident in delivering value through expert access and powerful tools](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

### Content Creation and Technical SEO

  - [Daniel noted lack of creativity in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Request for more technical SEO checklists and collaborative audits](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Content repurposing workflows not fully realized](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Potential to integrate HeyGen's video creation capabilities into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

### Contract and Budget Concerns

  - [3-month spike at $30K/month, difficult to justify extension without clear results](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Several months left in current contract](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [Need to recalibrate strategy and show quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)

### Proposed Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to regroup and propose prioritized strategy for coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Conduct a QBR-style review of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Explore integration of HeyGen's video generation tools in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Investigate early access to HeyGen's upcoming API features for programmatic page creation](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to regroup and propose new prioritized strategy within a week](https://fathom.video/share/272mihtUCqX-2Mr1niv4ynwzifsHHV64?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

action_items.description: Regroup w/ team (incl. Dave, Kirkland). Create new strategy/priorities for next several weeks. Prepare QBR-style recap. Share with HeyGen team within 1 week.
Follow up w/ API lead re: video creation API availability. Confirm timeline (est. 1-2 months). Check if early access possible for GrowthX team.
Find/create better method to showcase latest HeyGen features/roadmap for partners. If not found, compile info from news section.
